misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, a formidable presence hailing from Hirsala Golf, is known for his tenacity and colorful language on the course. While his competitors may find his frequent swearing off-putting, it is all part of Simo's intense focus and drive to succeed.

Since his debut, Simo has participated in 10 Hector Trophée tournaments, securing the coveted Hector Trophée on three occasions. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Simo remains a fierce competitor in the individual events.

For the 2025 season, Simo adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter, a move that he claims has greatly improved his putting accuracy and consistency. Opponents and spectators alike eagerly anticipate Simo's 11th appearance at Hector Trophée 2026.
